Sunshine Singalong

Bold primary colors and a giant clay sunshine crown the top of this toddler-perfect chore chart. Chunky red, sky blue, and watermelon green rows march along like verses of a favourite nursery song — bright, cheerful, and impossible to ignore.

View JSON
